issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 12 dmg (52% of 23 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 103 (floor 1, encounter 2, turn 15), the enemy dealt 12 damage when the player had 23 HP. This is 52% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 12 damage (52% of player's 23 HP)

issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 24 dmg (141% of 17 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 120 (floor 1, encounter 2, turn 19), the enemy dealt 24 damage when the player had 17 HP. This is 141% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 24 damage (141% of player's 17 HP)

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1, encounter 2 (stone_sentinel) — struggling profile
issues.description: The struggling player was defeated by stone_sentinel (mini_boss) on floor 1, encounter 2 after 19 turns. They dealt 42 damage but took 105. Accuracy was 35.1%. Dying on floor 1 is extremely punishing for retention.

evidence.metric: Defeated on floor 1 by stone_sentinel (105 damage taken)

issues.suggestedFix: Reduce floor 1 enemy damage or HP, or add canary difficulty reduction for struggling players

issues.title: Unfun moment: HP dropped from 59 to 0 in single encounter (floor 1, stone_sentinel)
issues.description: During encounter 2 on floor 1 against stone_sentinel (mini_boss), the player's HP plummeted from 59 (74%) to 0 (0%). This 59 HP loss in a single encounter feels punishing and demoralizing, especially for struggling players.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap maximum damage per encounter or add a "mercy" mechanic that reduces damage after a severe hit
